intro: Terms and Conditions of Use and Professional Engagement
Last Updated: 25 February 2026

These Terms and Conditions of Use and Professional Engagement (“Terms”) govern access to and use of the website www.gragabo.com (the “Website”) and regulate the legal relationship between users, clients, and counterparties (“Users”, “Clients”, “you”) and Gragabo DOO Beograd (“Gragabo”, “we”, “us”, “our”).
These Terms apply to all interactions with Gragabo, including, without limitation:
* access to and use of the Website and its digital content;
* submission of diagnostic, analytical, or assessment information;
* preliminary consultations and introductory meetings;
* professional evaluations and advisory engagements;
* strategic, operational, and governance-related services;
* customised consulting projects and long-term cooperation arrangements.

These Terms constitute legally binding contractual terms within the meaning of the Law on Obligations of the Republic of Serbia (Zakon o obligacionim odnosima) and are intended to regulate rights, obligations, liabilities, and risk allocation between the parties in a transparent, predictable, and enforceable manner.
Corporate Status and Strategic Context
Gragabo is a commercial company established under the laws of the Republic of Serbia and registered for professional consulting and management advisory activities under classification 70.22.

Gragabo has been founded and structured as a long-term, family-owned enterprise with the strategic objective of progressive institutional development, including potential transformation into a joint-stock company, establishment of affiliated entities, trust and holding structures, and participation in international capital and financial markets.
Accordingly, Gragabo conducts its operations in accordance with:
* the Law on Companies (Zakon o privrednim društvima);
* the Law on Obligations;
* applicable professional standards;
* recognised principles of corporate governance and fiduciary responsibility.
These Terms are designed to support that long-term institutional framework.
Nature of the Website and Preliminary Interactions
The Website serves primarily as:
* an informational and presentation platform;
* an initial communication interface;
* a preliminary diagnostic and qualification mechanism;
* a professional screening and preparation tool.

Submission of forms, participation in introductory video consultations, and preliminary communications are intended primarily for mutual evaluation, familiarisation, and assessment of potential cooperation.
Unless expressly agreed otherwise in writing:
* introductory consultations and diagnostic exchanges do not constitute paid professional engagements;
* no obligation to enter into a formal contractual relationship arises from such preliminary interactions;
* Gragabo reserves the right to accept or decline cooperation following internal evaluation.
This approach reflects recognised international advisory and consulting practices and protects both parties from premature contractual commitments.
Acceptance and Binding Effect
By accessing the Website, submitting information, communicating with Gragabo, or engaging in any form of cooperation, you expressly confirm that:

title: 1. you have read these Terms in their entirety;
3. you accept them freely and without reservation;
4. you possess the legal capacity and authority to enter into binding obligations.
intro: Your acceptance constitutes a legally valid declaration of intent within the meaning of Serbian contract law.
Where applicable law requires explicit consent, electronic acceptance, written confirmation, or additional formalities, such requirements shall prevail.
Relationship to Individual Agreements
These Terms establish the general contractual framework governing interactions with Gragabo.
Specific projects, services, or long-term engagements may be governed by:
* individual service agreements;
* engagement letters;
* framework contracts;
* special terms;
* commercial offers.
In the event of conflict, the provisions of such specific agreements shall prevail over these general Terms, unless mandatory law provides otherwise.
Non-Acceptance
If you do not agree with any provision of these Terms, in whole or in part, you are not authorised to:
* access the Website;
* submit information;
* use Gragabo’s services;
* engage in professional cooperation.
Continued use shall be deemed conclusive evidence of acceptance.

content: For the purposes of these Terms, unless the context clearly requires otherwise, the following expressions shall have the meanings set out below:

* the Law on Electronic Commerce (Zakon o elektronskoj trgovini);
* the Law on Electronic Documents, Electronic Identification and Trust Services;
* the Law on Personal Data Protection;

Introductory consultations of limited duration (including standard thirty-minute video consultations) are intended primarily for preliminary evaluation, mutual familiarisation, and diagnostic purposes and shall not, in themselves, constitute paid professional services unless expressly agreed in writing.
means any reports, analyses, recommendations, presentations, models, documentation, strategic frameworks, or other work products produced by Gragabo in the course of providing Services.

means all questionnaires, forms, assessments, submissions, and supporting documentation provided by Users or Clients for the purpose of preliminary evaluation, internal analysis, and preparation for potential engagement.
Such materials serve as professional screening and qualification instruments.
means any formal professional relationship between Gragabo and a Client arising from an Agreement for the provision of Services.

means Gragabo DOO Beograd, a company incorporated under the laws of the Republic of Serbia, together with its present and future subsidiaries, affiliates, holding entities, and successor entities, where applicable.

whether registered or unregistered, and all related applications and renewals.

means any individual or entity that accesses, browses, or interacts with the Website, regardless of whether a contractual relationship exists.
means the official internet domain operated by Gragabo at www.gragabo.com, including all associated subdomains, digital platforms, and online interfaces.

subsections.title: 1.2 Interpretation
content: These Terms shall be interpreted in accordance with the principles of good faith, fairness, and contractual equilibrium, as recognised under the Law on Obligations and general principles of international commercial law.
Section headings are inserted for convenience only and shall not affect interpretation.
Words in the singular include the plural and vice versa.
Words denoting any gender include all genders.
References to statutes, regulations, or legal provisions include:
The words “including”, “in particular”, and similar expressions shall be construed as illustrative and not restrictive.
“Business Day” means any day other than a Saturday, Sunday, or public holiday in the Republic of Serbia.
References to “writing” include electronic communications, in accordance with the Law on Electronic Commerce and the Law on Electronic Documents, Electronic Identification and Trust Services.
References to time are references to Central European Time (CET), unless otherwise stated.
In the event of inconsistency between these Terms and any specific Agreement, the specific Agreement shall prevail, subject to mandatory law.
Where any provision is ambiguous, it shall be interpreted in a manner that preserves its validity and commercial purpose to the greatest extent permitted by law.

content: These Terms shall be interpreted and applied in accordance with:
* the principle of good faith and fair dealing (savestan i pošten odnos);
Both Parties undertake to act in a manner consistent with these principles.

This list is indicative and non-exhaustive.

content: These Terms supersede all prior versions.

content: Invalidity of any part does not affect the remainder.
